category.name: zoo.packs.resources
category.item: This pack contains 40 units of Superfood and 5 Paws. This will give you 40x double BZ when feeding and see progress in beautifying your enclosures!
This pack contains 125 units of Superfood and 20 Paws. This will give you 125x double BZ and progress towards beautifying your enclosures!
This package contains 350 units of superfood and 30 paws, but also 5 gifts with 5 units of superfood for 5 of your friends. So they can also benefit from this package!
